description: Migrate the Supabase plugin to use SDK utilities: replace manual localStorage access with getLocalStorage, replace manual token persistence with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache, replace manual waitForAuth with waitUntil, and add missing parseRetryAfterMs usage.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/supabase && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Migrate Supabase plugin to SDK utilities and fix parseRetryAfterMs
userStories.description: Replace Supabase's manual localStorage, token persistence, and waitForAuth with SDK equivalents. Fix the rate limit parsing to use parseRetryAfterMs instead of manual Number() conversion.
acceptanceCriteria: Direct localStorage.getItem calls replaced with getLocalStorage from SDK
waitForAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
Rate limit handling uses parseRetryAfterMs from SDK instead of manual Number(retryAfter) * 1000
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/supabase/src/supabase-api.ts

Context:
1. localStorage at line 44: `const raw = localStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY);` → `const raw = getLocalStorage(TOKEN_KEY);`

2. Token persistence at lines 10-38 — replace with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache.

3. waitForAuth at lines 62-79 — standard polling pattern.

4. BUG FIX — Rate limit parsing at lines 138-139:
```typescript
const retryMs = retryAfter ? Number(retryAfter) * 1000 : undefined;
```
This breaks on HTTP-date format Retry-After headers (e.g., 'Wed, 21 Oct 2015 07:28:00 GMT'). Replace with:
```typescript
import { parseRetryAfterMs } from '@opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk';
const retryMs = retryAfter ? parseRetryAfterMs(retryAfter) : undefined;
```

Constraints:
- Do NOT change isAuthenticated() logic
- Do NOT change the api() function's main structure — only the rate limit parsing within it
- Do NOT change any tool files
